description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a reusable .ruby template with the ruby:$RUBY_VERSION Docker image, runs ruby -v, configures bundler for deployment, installs dependencies with bundle install -j $(nproc), caches the vendor/ruby directory keyed by ruby$RUBY_VERSION, sets LANG to C.UTF-8, and executes in parallel for RUBY_VERSION values 3.1 and 3.2, all in the default test stage. Add a benchmark job extending .ruby that runs ./benchmark/benchmark.rb. Add a gem job extending .ruby that runs bundle exec rake install. Add an rspec job extending .ruby that runs bundle exec rake spec and publishes rspec.xml as a JUnit artifact. Add a rubocop job extending .ruby that runs bundle exec rubocop. Include the official Security/SAST, Dependency-Scanning, and Code-Quality templates.
